description: Claude Code session log inspection ops — list, tail, summarize .jsonl transcripts under ~/.claude/projects/.

claude-log-list.description: List N recent Claude sessions for project (def 10). UUID, mtime, line count, first user msg

claude-log-tail.description: Last N events of session in compact form. Def N=30. Use after claude-log-list

claude-log-summary.description: Session digest: tool counts, errors, final msg, total turns
